title: Lights
subtitle: Turn lights on and off around the home

noneAdopted.title: No lights imported yet
noneAdopted.body: Tap "Sync" to discover the devices on your eWeLink account.

notConfigured.title: Set up eWeLink
notConfigured.body: Connect your eWeLink account from settings to control lights.

settings.title: Lights (eWeLink)
settings.subtitle: Connect your account to control lights from the panel
settings.subtitleOauth: Authorize the panel to access your eWeLink account. The official eWeLink consent page will open; once confirmed, the panel receives the tokens.

appMissing.title: App ID / App Secret missing
appMissing.body: Ask the server to set EWELINK_APP_ID and EWELINK_APP_SECRET in .env. Register a free app at dev.ewelink.cc to obtain them.

form.waitingHint: Complete the authorization in the eWeLink window. It'll return here automatically once confirmed.

confirmDisconnect.title: Disconnect eWeLink?
confirmDisconnect.body: This removes your credentials and all imported lights. You'll need to sync again afterwards.
